steps.title: Recall exponential growth form
steps.content:
When $y$ grows by a fixed percent for each unit increase in $x$, the relationship is:
$$y = y_0 (1 + r)^x$$
where $y_0$ is the value at $x = 0$ and $r$ is the growth rate as a decimal.

steps.title: Plug in the values
steps.content:
$y_0 = 90$ and $r = 0.20$ (20%):
$$y = 90(1.20)^x$$
That matches choice A — A is correct.
